canonical_operators.language: stack the black bowl in the middle on the black bowl at the front

operators.name: PickUp
operators.description: pick up the black bowl in the middle

operators.name: Place
operators.description: stack the black bowl in the middle on the black bowl at the front

annotation.description: The robot moves to the middle black bowl, closes its gripper around it, and lifts it off the table.
The robot places the middle black bowl on top of the back black bowl.
The robot picks up the middle black bowl from the table.

annotation.operator: Place[middle black bowl, back black bowl]
effects: On[middle black bowl, back black bowl]
annotation.description: The robot places the middle black bowl onto the back black bowl to stack them.
The robot picks up the middle black bowl from the table.
